# CASE: plt-case-non-complete-audit-2026-06-08

Accuracy audit of every **non-COMPLETE** case file in `docs/cases/`. For each case the audit
verifies whether the case's stated goal was actually achieved (or is legitimately still
open/blocked), using case internals + cross-tracking caches + sibling-repo git/code + Pi/ops
references. Divergence is flagged even when slight.

## Scope

- **In:** all 17 case files whose Run State `status:` is not COMPLETE (IN_PROGRESS / BLOCKED /
  APPROVED), plus the one inverse-drift case (`infra-case-002`, registry COMPLETE but Run State
  IN_PROGRESS).
- **Out:** COMPLETE cases; app-code changes; production/Pi execution (documented, not run).
- **Evidence depth:** full_ops — case + cross-tracking + sibling-repo git/code spot-checks +
  Pi/operator step references. Sibling repos (`woosoo-nexus`, `tablet-ordering-pwa`,
  `woosoo-print-bridge`) are present locally on `dev`.

## Verdict legend

| Verdict | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `ON_TRACK` | Open and progressing honestly; status accurate. |
| `GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED` | Work landed in code/docs; case never advanced to COMPLETE (needs Verifier/Executioner). |
| `DRIFT_MINOR` | Wording/label/status-cache mismatch; no functional gap. |
| `DRIFT_MAJOR` | Status materially wrong vs evidence (e.g. registry COMPLETE while work open). |
| `BLOCKED_LEGIT` | Deliberately blocked/deferred with a documented reason. |
| `BLOCKED_STALE` | Still marked BLOCKED but the blocking findings are obsolete. |
| `OPS_PENDING` | Code complete; only an operator/Pi step remains; honestly recorded. |

## Post-audit remediation applied (2026-06-08)

Operator directive: an agent must never self-plant a claim (completion, ownership, or stray
artifact); only the operator/Executioner claims. Applied:

1. **Registry generator bug** (finding #1) — `scripts/obsidian-case-registry.ps1` status matching anchored to the leading token; `CASE_REGISTRY.md` regenerated; `infra-case-002` now `IN_PROGRESS`.
2. **Premature completion claim** (finding #4) — `plt-case-010` `status: APPROVED` reverted to `IN_PROGRESS` (APPROVED is an Executioner verdict; only the operator-driven gate may set it).
3. **Login.vue ownership collision** (findings #2/#3, cross-tracking #5) — ownership notes added to both [[redesign-woosoo-nexus-login-page]] (sole owner) and [[nexus-ui-handoff-visual-implementation]] (Login out of scope); the actual close/revert of `Login.vue` still requires operator browser approval at `/login`.
4. **Stray vault artifacts** — removed empty root canvases `Untitled.canvas` and `Untitled 1.canvas`.

---

## Detailed findings

### 1. infra-case-002-deploy-stability-wrappers — DRIFT_MAJOR

- **Goal:** close five deploy-stability gaps with platform-root wrappers + rollback parity + Pi end-to-end verification.
- **Evidence:** gaps 1–4 implemented in tree — `scripts/deployment/rollback-client.sh` (PLATFORM_ROOT/`$COMPOSE_CMD`), `scripts/deployment/deploy-all.sh`, `deploy.sh:32-33` (`WOOSOO_DEPLOY_BRANCH:-dev`), `scripts/deployment/legacy/` + `legacy/README.md`. Gap 5 (Pi runtime E2E) **not closed** — case Run State line 13: `IN_PROGRESS (Stage A + R2 ... Stage B Pi verification pending)`; `next_agent: verifier (Pi runtime — Stage B)`.
- **Drift + root cause:** `CASE_REGISTRY.md` showed `✅ COMPLETE` while case Run State, Executioner (pending), and `state/QUEUE.md` Bucket B all say Stage B is open. The cause was a **generator bug**: `scripts/obsidian-case-registry.ps1`'s `Format-Status` (and the header tally) tested `COMPLETE` as an unanchored substring **before** `IN_PROGRESS`, so this case's verbose status `IN_PROGRESS (Stage A + R2 re-verification complete on dev; Stage B Pi verification pending)` matched on the word "complete". **Fixed** by anchoring status matching to the leading token (IN_PROGRESS/BLOCKED checked before COMPLETE; tally uses `^\s*` anchors). Registry regenerated → now `🟡 IN_PROGRESS`.
- **Remediation:** done — generator fixed + registry regenerated. Do not add a `state/DONE.md` row until Stage B + Executioner APPROVED. Operator runs `sudo bash scripts/deployment/deploy-all.sh` + rollback drill on Pi (can fold into `pi-stability-verify.sh`).

### 2. nexus-ui-handoff-visual-implementation — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** apply remaining visual-only Nexus admin UI handoff (Login + backend explicitly out of scope).
- **Evidence:** case says "partially applied", `Files Changed: Pending`, specialist not started — but nexus `dev` commit `6e1ec1f` (2026-06-04) "feat(ui): apply visual handoff across admin pages; add software-dev docs" applied the handoff across 20+ admin pages; `handoff/IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOVER.md` updated. Confirmed via `git -C woosoo-nexus log`.
- **Scope violation (flag):** `6e1ec1f` also rewrote `resources/js/pages/auth/Login.vue` (verified: `showPassword` ref, Eye/EyeOff, split `grid-cols` layout present) although both this case and the handoff doc declare Login out of scope. This overlaps [[redesign-woosoo-nexus-login-page]].
- **Remediation:** run Verifier (`npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` in `woosoo-nexus`); update case `Files Changed` with `6e1ec1f`/`1b13fbb`; advance Run State `last_completed_agent: specialist` → `next_agent: verifier`; record the Login overlap and let operator decide ownership (close-or-split).

### 3. redesign-woosoo-nexus-login-page — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** redesign `Login.vue` to dark warm split layout w/ password reveal, preserving Inertia auth flow.
- **Evidence:** case is BLOCKED on `waiting-user-design-approval` with `Verification: Pending`, yet current `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/auth/Login.vue` already implements the proposed design (`showPassword` + Eye/EyeOff toggle, dark split layout, brand panel, amber accent, `form.post(route('login'))` preserved) — landed via `6e1ec1f` after the case was blocked.
- **Drift:** goal achieved in code without case approval/closure; implemented by the handoff merge that wasn't supposed to touch Login (ownership collision).
- **Remediation:** operator reviews `/login` in browser. If approved → close as COMPLETE citing `6e1ec1f`. If not → revert the Login portion and re-run specialist on a dedicated branch. Either way, document the relationship to the handoff case to remove duplicate ownership.

### 4. plt-case-010-context7-cursor-guide — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** document Context7 MCP usage in Cursor for operators.
- **Evidence:** `docs/CONTEXT7_GUIDE.md` exists (canonical, `last_reviewed: 2026-06-06`); linked from `docs/USAGE_GUIDE.md` (§ Context7) and `docs/README.md` Boot Layer. Verifier section present in case.
- **Drift (semantic):** Run State `status: APPROVED` and registry `APPROVED` were set while `next_agent: executioner` and `## Executioner` reads pending — APPROVED used before the Executioner gate ran. Not in `state/DONE.md`.
- **Remediation:** run Executioner; on APPROVED set `status: COMPLETE`, append `state/DONE.md`, and normalize the registry glyph to match other closed plt-cases.

### 5. plt-case-executioner-simplifier-gate — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** make the Executioner reject when `## Code Simplification` (and Hygiene) audit lines are missing or bare-`SKIPPED`.
- **Evidence:** `.claude/agents/executioner.md` lines 51–54 add the reject clauses for missing/bare-SKIPPED `## Code Simplification` and `## Hygiene` — matches (and slightly exceeds) the goal.
- **Drift:** case IN_PROGRESS (`next_agent: verifier`); `state/QUEUE.md` rows still `queued`.
- **Remediation:** Verifier greps the agent def, Executioner closes → COMPLETE; move the QUEUE row to DONE.

### 6. plt-case-chain-doc-sync — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** sync `AGENTS.md` inline summary, `hooks/execute.md`, `PROTOCOL.md` to the 6-step chain.
- **Evidence:** all three updated (AGENTS.md inline summary + formal block, execute.md Tier 2/3 chains, PROTOCOL.md tiers table) include `code-simplifier` and `scribe`.
- **Residual drift (out of this case's scope, file as follow-up):** `docs/USAGE_GUIDE.md` (title/§1 still "4-Agent"), `docs/README.md` ("Lite 4-agent"), `.agents/skills/agent-sequence/SKILL.md` (still 4-step) lag the 6-step chain.
- **Remediation:** Verifier greps → Executioner → COMPLETE; open a follow-up for the three residual docs.

### 7. infra-case-005-local-pipeline-runner — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** single dev test-deploy command replacing manual docker/artisan chains.
- **Evidence:** `run` → `scripts/pipeline.sh` (targets dev/sync/rebuild/certs/health/network/check/pi/staging), `scripts/lib/pipeline-ui.sh`, `scripts/install.sh` (`pld`/`woosoo` symlinks), `pld.ps1`/`pld.cmd`/`.pld/manifest.yaml`; `DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md` documents `pld dev`/`woosoo dev`. `shipped_commit: 4e7ee79`, `next_agent: executioner`.
- **Drift:** registry blurb still states the *problem* ("No single command exists…"); not in `state/QUEUE.md`/`state/WORK.md`.
- **Remediation:** run Executioner; record `pld dev`/`pld sync` smoke; registry regen refreshes the blurb.

### 8. infra-case-006-dynamic-lan-host — GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED

- **Goal:** dynamic `PUBLIC_HOST`/LAN resolution for WSL + Pi, removing hardcoded `192.168.100.7`.
- **Evidence:** `scripts/lib/host-network.sh` (detect runtime/LAN IP, drift checks, sync, Reverb origins sync), `scripts/windows/*.ps1`, `pipeline.sh` `network` target + health uses localhost+LAN WARN (no hardcoded fallback), `dev-preflight.sh` drift WARN, nginx `map $canonical_host` IPv4 regex.
- **Drift:** `next_agent: verifier`; absent from `state/QUEUE.md`/`state/WORK.md`; no Verifier/Executioner sections.
- **Remediation:** run Verifier (`pre-merge-check.ps1 -App woosoo-platform` + WSL operator smoke) → Executioner.

### 9. infra-case-009-deploy-script-hardening — ON_TRACK

- **Goal:** patch four post-audit deploy-script gaps (config-guard parity, readiness timeout alignment, Reverb origin dedupe, prod HTTPS enforcement).
- **Evidence:** all four present — `switch-network.sh:41-42` (`_config-guard.sh` + `woosoo_assert_safe_config`), `deploy.sh:260-261` (`DEPLOY_READY_ATTEMPTS=90`/`DELAY=2` = 180s parity), `host-network.sh` `woosoo_reverb_allowed_origins_sync`, `apply-woosoo-config.sh:133-134` (abort if production && scheme != https). Complementary to [[infra-case-008-deployment-env-audit]] (no duplication/conflict).
- **Drift:** not in `state/QUEUE.md`/`state/WORK.md` (under-tracked, not wrong).
- **Remediation:** Verifier (`bash -n` + line-level claim check) → Executioner → `state/DONE.md`.

### 10. kds-implementation-plan — ON_TRACK (+ DRIFT_MINOR)

- **Goal:** spec + phased KDS build for `woosoo-nexus`, deferred until Pi stability; UI/backend slices progressing in parallel per operator reprioritization.
- **Evidence:** nexus `dev` has real KDS beyond the UI-only [[nex-case-016-kds-ui-only]]: routes `GET /kds`, `POST /kds/orders/{order}/advance`, `POST /kds/items/{item}/toggle` (`routes/web.php:60-62`); `KdsController.php` with locks + terminal guards; commits `6293bd2`→`6d61a5f`→`e046c88`→`73a50b7`/`bcba487`/`13afccf`; 13 KDS tests reported. `Display.vue` interactions client-side only (Echo wiring honestly deferred). Plan does **not** over-claim v1.0.
- **Drift (minor):** case note marks `13afccf` "LOCAL, push pending" — **stale** (it is on `origin/dev`). `state/QUEUE.md` KDS-EPIC = `deferred` and `state/WORK.md` "KDS deferred" conflict with active `dev` landings — narrative split.
- **Remediation:** Verifier gate; fix the `13afccf` push-pending note; relabel QUEUE/WORK as "spec + partial P0/P1 on dev, Pi-gated for production"; never claim P2+/Echo until implemented.

### 11. plt-case-003-cross-app-orchestration — DRIFT_MINOR

- **Goal:** cross-app observability/contract-freeze/tooling after single-app work + contracts frozen.
- **Evidence:** scaffold only; `## Files Changed` empty; `next_agent: contrarian`. `state/DEPS.md` DEP-001/002/003 all confirmed (deps satisfied). No implementation artifacts — deferral is intentional, not dep-blocked.
- **Drift:** case + registry = IN_PROGRESS while `state/QUEUE.md` Bucket C = `deferred`. Not started.
- **Remediation:** label case/registry `deferred` (or BLOCKED with reason "post-stabilization") to match QUEUE; keep `next_agent: contrarian`.

### 12. plt-case-stability-remediation — OPS_PENDING

- **Goal:** stabilize the restaurant stack on the Pi (P0–P1b) before KDS; orchestration runbook for Bucket B gates.
- **Evidence:** `scripts/deployment/pi-stability-verify.sh` exists (P0/P1 auto-checks); `apply-woosoo-config.sh:459` `set_env "SESSION_DOMAIN" ""` matches NEX-014 code-complete; case correctly marks TAB-CASE-011/NEX-CASE-015/docs #156 COMPLETE; P0/P1a/P1b ops-pending. `state/WORK.md` active task aligned.
- **Drift:** minor — `CLAUDE.local.md` #156 content-accuracy note is stale vs case; no DONE row (correct).
- **Remediation:** operator runs `sudo bash scripts/deployment/pi-stability-verify.sh` on Pi; log in Handoff; close when P0–P1b green.

### 13. infra-case-001-pi-platform-migration — OPS_PENDING

- **Goal:** migrate Pi from single-repo (`woosoo-nexus/` compose root) to platform-root orchestration, verified on hardware.
- **Evidence:** platform-side script fixes present (`woosoo-health.sh`, `woosoo-backup.sh` use `WOOSOO_PLATFORM_PATH`); case cites `f7d2707`. Pi runtime not verifiable from repo.
- **Drift:** `## Remaining Risks` is stale — lists `rollback-client.sh` (migrated in infra-case-002) and four tablet scripts (now quarantined under `scripts/deployment/legacy/`) as unmigrated; `next_agent: specialist:infra` is stale (work is Pi execution, not more code).
- **Remediation:** run Pi runbook on hardware; refresh Remaining Risks; set `next_agent` to operator/verifier; close after Pi smoke + Executioner.

### 14. prn-rebuild-apk-scp-pi — OPS_PENDING

- **Goal:** rebuild Flutter release APK from current repo state and SCP/install to the Pi tablet.
- **Evidence:** Specialist built APK on 2026-05-21 from **`staging`** (flutter analyze clean, 111 tests, 51.3MB) but SCP/install never executed. Current state: no `app-release.apk` in `woosoo-print-bridge/build/` (`14a939b` removed artifacts); local branch is **`dev`** at `a1d81d8`; `830fdfd` + 11 commits after → the May 21 APK is **stale**. `CLAUDE.local.md` confirms "APK rebuild (`830fdfd`) pending".
- **Drift:** case branch field says `staging`; repo is on `dev`.
- **Remediation:** rebuild APK from current `dev`, record artifact hash/size, operator confirms Pi SCP target + installs, Verifier, then close. Update case branch field to `dev`.

### 15. tablet-screen-ui-ux-review — BLOCKED_STALE

- **Goal:** review-only UI/UX audit of the tablet PWA; implement only after user approval (Executioner `REJECTED` = review complete, no fixes).
- **Evidence:** several findings now obsolete vs `tablet-ordering-pwa` `dev`: duplicate table-name pill removed; `PackageCard` "Preview the meats" superseded by `tests/package-card-contract.spec.ts` (`>View<` + intentional select/footer split); `SupportFab.vue` not found; hardcoded `Table 4` no matches. A few (package-disallowed meat opacity, in-session inert buttons, raw `error?.message`) unverified/possibly still valid.
- **Drift:** the block is valid (awaiting approval) but the captured findings are partly stale; the cited pre-merge test failure would not reproduce against the current test file.
- **Remediation:** refresh Investigation/Verification with a fresh source audit; strike resolved findings; re-run `pre-merge-check.ps1 -App tablet-ordering-pwa` for a current baseline; keep BLOCKED until operator approves an implementation pass.

- **Goal:** track (do NOT implement yet) the bind-mount → immutable-image production migration.
- **Evidence:** case explicitly TRACKED/NOT STARTED; `blocked_reason` = deferred by priority (not dep-blocked); `compose.yaml` still hot-deploy bind-mount (immutable mode = commented guidance). Registry/QUEUE Bucket C/WORK all consistent; DONE absent.
- **Remediation:** none until post-stabilization; when scheduled run Tier 3 Contrarian + Pi rollback rehearsal.

### 17. nex-case-012-admin-ui-prototype-impl — BLOCKED_LEGIT

- **Goal:** implement the Claude Design admin prototype (Tablet Categories + Packages) into nexus SFCs after stabilization.

- **Remediation:** leave blocked until operator pulls post-stabilization; confirm the external design bundle is in hand before triage.

---

## Cross-tracking (registry vs case vs caches)

1. **`infra-case-002` registry COMPLETE was the only hard inverse-drift** — caused by a status-classification bug in `scripts/obsidian-case-registry.ps1` (unanchored "complete" substring match). Fixed (anchored leading-token matching) and `CASE_REGISTRY.md` regenerated → `🟡 IN_PROGRESS`. Tally corrected (no more double-count): 88 cases, 68 complete, 17 active/blocked.
2. **Seven GOAL_ACHIEVED_BUT_NOT_CLOSED cases** have implementation in the tree (or docs) but never passed Verifier+Executioner. These are real, finishable closures — not new work.
3. **`APPROVED` vs `COMPLETE` semantics** violated on `plt-case-010` (APPROVED set before the Executioner gate; no `state/DONE.md` row).
4. **`state/QUEUE.md` under-tracks post-stabilization infra** — `infra-case-005/006/009` are in the registry but missing from QUEUE; KDS-EPIC reads `deferred` while KDS code actively lands on nexus `dev`.
5. **Nexus UI ownership collision** — `redesign-woosoo-nexus-login-page` was implemented by the `nexus-ui-handoff` merge (`6e1ec1f`), which declared Login out of scope. Two cases now claim the same `Login.vue`.
6. **No fabricated completion claims** were found in any non-COMPLETE case; open work is honestly recorded (the drift is in the registry/caches, not invented "done" assertions). The single stale push claim (`kds` `13afccf` "push pending") is the closest exception.

## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

Read-only accuracy audit of 17 non-COMPLETE cases (16 registry-flagged + 1 inverse-drift). Evidence
gathered from case files, `state/` caches, `CLAUDE.local.md`, and sibling repos `woosoo-nexus` /
`tablet-ordering-pwa` / `woosoo-print-bridge` (on `dev`). Two highest-impact findings were
spot-verified directly: `infra-case-002` Run State (line 13) vs registry COMPLETE; and nexus
`6e1ec1f` applying the admin handoff + `Login.vue` redesign (`showPassword`/`EyeOff`/`grid-cols`).

Files written by this audit: this report; a one-line precedence fix to
`scripts/obsidian-case-registry.ps1` (anchored status matching, which is what actually corrected
the `infra-case-002` registry drift); and the regenerated `CASE_REGISTRY.md`. No case Run States
were edited and no cases were closed — those require the Verifier/Executioner gates and are listed
as remediation above.

## Code Simplification

SKIPPED - no simplifications identified. One non-cosmetic bug fix was applied to
`scripts/obsidian-case-registry.ps1` (anchor status matching to the leading token in both
`Format-Status` and the header tally) to correct the `infra-case-002` misclassification; this is a
correctness fix, not a clarity refactor, and the script remains self-documenting.
